TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Jeff_Ayres, title = Jeff_Ayres, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Jeff_Ayres} }

S.FORM: Jeff Ayres unu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, u p'agal tins' tay suruw. Jeff Ayres i 2009 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 2 ku uwac atu silsil 31, namapili' tu nu Sacramento Kings putiput. 4 bulad 29 demiad, 1987 a mihca, Jeff Ayres, miunduay.
S.PHON: *…ôff ajr…ôs unu sjubaj kanas-mar~…ĺi miunduaj nu amir~…ĺika nba nisakaput, u p Ē~ °agar~…ĺ tins Ē~ ° taj suruw. *…ôff ajr…ôs i **** a mińß ¶an nba sapapir~…ĺi Ē~ ° mimar~…ĺiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwa ¶ atu sir~…ĺsir~…ĺ **, namapir~…ĺi Ē~ ° tu nu sa ¶ram…ônto kiŇčs putiput. * bur~…ĺad ** d…ômiad, **** a mińß ¶a, *…ôff ajr…ôs, miunduaj.
S.FORM: Jeff Ayres unu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, u p'agal tins' tay suruw. Jeff Ayres i 2009 a mihcan NBA sapapili' mimaliay a kawaw, saka 2 ku uwac atu silsil 31, namapili' tu nu Sacramento Kings putiput. 4 bulad 29 demiad, 1987 a mihca, Jeff Ayres, miunduay.
S.PHON: *…ôff ajr…ôs unu sjubaj kanas-mar~…ĺi miunduaj nu amir~…ĺika nba nisakaput, u p Ē~ °agar~…ĺ tins Ē~ ° taj suruw. *…ôff ajr…ôs i **** a mińß ¶an nba sapapir~…ĺi Ē~ ° mimar~…ĺiaj a kawaw, saka * ku uwa ¶ atu sir~…ĺsir~…ĺ **, namapir~…ĺi Ē~ ° tu nu sa ¶ram…ônto kiŇčs putiput. * bur~…ĺad ** d…ômiad, **** a mińß ¶a, *…ôff ajr…ôs, miunduaj.
